---
title: "News"
pagetitle: "News — Arvind Karunakaran"
description: "Recent updates from Arvind Karunakaran: awards, new papers, and talks."
---

Recent updates — awards, new papers, and talks. Newest first. <!-- To post news: copy an existing item and add it at the TOP of the list
     below (each item = a news-date block followed by a news-body block). -->

::: news-list
- ::: news-date
  2025
  :::

  ::: news-body
  Named to the **Thinkers50 Radar** cohort, recognizing management thinkers most likely to shape the future of how organizations are run.
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2025
  :::

  ::: news-body
  Recognized as an **Ascendant Scholar** by the Western Academy of Management.
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2025
  :::

  ::: news-body
  “Artificial Intelligence at Work: An Integrative Review on the Impact of AI on Workplace Inequality” (with S. Lebovitz, D. Narayanan & H. Rahman) published in *Academy of Management Annals*.
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2025
  :::

  ::: news-body
  Received the **Best Published Paper Award** from the Communications, Information Technologies, & Media Sociology Section of the American Sociological Association, and the **Gerard J. Tellis Best Junior Faculty Paper Award** at the AIM Conference.
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2024
  :::

  ::: news-body
  “Frontline Professionals in the Wake of Social Media Scrutiny” published in *Administrative Science Quarterly*.
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2024
  :::

  ::: news-body
  Received the **W. Richard Scott Article Award** (ASA, Organizations, Occupations, and Work Section) and the **Responsible Research in Management Award** (RRBM / AOM Fellows Group).
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2023
  :::

  ::: news-body
  Named a **CASBS Summer Institute Fellow** and runner-up for the **ASQ Best Paper based on a Dissertation**.
  :::

- ::: news-date
  2022
  :::

  ::: news-body
  Appointed **Jagdeep & Roshni Singh Faculty Fellow** at Stanford University; received the **Giarratani Rising Star Award** from the Industry Studies Association.
  :::
:::
